Event: Royal Challenge - Season 46
Event Date: 01/02/2026
Sage Bot Item Code: RI297
Iron Fury Ring

Once in a while, the unit deals pure damage equal to 150% of the unit's attack to 2 random enemy units every second for 2 sec. If a target has more than 50% health after the damage was dealt, all of its stats are reduced by 20% for 3 sec. If the target has less than 50% health after the damage was dealt, the target is turned into a rock for 2 sec. For the duration, the target is unable to move, and takes 35% more damage. The target also takes 98500 magic damage every second for the duration. When the effect wears off, the target explodes. The explosion deals 123100 pure damage to the target, and its physical and magic armor are reduced by 10% for 2 sec. 2 nearby enemy units are also hit by rocks. The rocks deal 147700 physical damage on impact and stun the targets for 2 sec.

Requirements: 98-100

User rating: item not rated yet
